test_groups.title: General credit card validation without options
test_groups.rationale: Tests common valid and invalid credit card numbers without specifying a provider.

test_groups.title: Validation with provider 'visa'
test_groups.rationale: Tests valid Visa credit card numbers and invalid numbers for other providers or malformed inputs.

test_groups.title: Validation with provider 'amex'
test_groups.rationale: Tests valid American Express credit card numbers and invalid numbers for other providers or malformed inputs.

test_groups.title: Validation with unsupported provider
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior when an unsupported provider is specified, ensuring no valid numbers are accepted.
